programs.title: Facing Waves
programs.desc: The BIC SUP Team explore the beautiful island of Barbados in search of the perfect wave.

programs.title: Dream Purchase
programs.desc: Dream Purchase follows the realization of an American dream. Everyone has dreamed of owning that special thing. For some its a classic car, for others a luxury home and for some even a helicopter or luxury yacht.

programs.title: Road Less Traveled
programs.desc: Jonathan digs around the Flanders exploring Western Europe's least understood region. He discovers how a Christmas cookie has turned into a spreading sensation and discovers a ghost town of automobiles with a mysterious past.

programs.title: Dream Cruises
programs.desc: A look at what are considered to be some of the best cruises in the world.

programs.title: Global Passport
programs.desc: Christina Cindrich visits the Amalfi Coast in Italy; this 25 mile-long stretch of postcard-perfect coastal towns have been a magnet for the jet-set and are easily one of the most beautiful regions in the whole world.

programs.title: Top Travel
programs.desc: Tapestry and weaving lessons; ancient castles.
